demographics.living_situation: resident in a residential aged care facility; normally mobilises with a walking frame

contact_nok.relationship: residential aged care nursing staff (present at the encounter)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lower stomach is in absolute agony, I have been pushing for hours but it feels like there is a rock stuck down there that won't come out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain got much worse this evening and she nearly passed out on the toilet from straining; the facility nurse is calling on her behalf for advice tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: worsening bowel habit over about a week; the severe pain came on today after hours of straining
symptom_narrative.duration: no bowel motion in the last four days; acute pain crisis this evening
symptom_narrative.character: cramping lower abdominal pain with a feeling of a hard 'rock' blocking the back passage; before this, hard, dry, pellet-like stools that were very painful to pass
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: absolute agony, the worst it has been
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down in the tummy and the back passage
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant this evening, worse with pushing/straining
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped; she tried pushing and using her finger to help but it did not work and was very painful
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: bloated and swollen lower tummy, poor appetite and feeling full quickly for the last two days; she nearly fainted on the toilet from the straining
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she says her bowels have been getting more and more difficult recently since her pain tablets were changed
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: normally walks with a frame; tonight she is in bed guarding her tummy after the near-faint and cannot get comfortable

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: codeine tablets for her arthritis joint pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a residential aged care facility; nursing staff present and reporting on her behalf; recently started a new stronger pain tablet for her arthritis

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: read out by facility nursing staff from the facility monitor; single reading, patient distressed and in pain
read out by facility nursing staff; patient in pain and straining

objective_data_offered.value: visibly distressed and sweaty, lying curled up in bed holding her lower tummy; lower abdomen looks swollen/distended on video
nursing staff report she nearly fainted on the toilet earlier tonight after prolonged straining and there was a near-fall in the bathroom; she has passed no stool for four days
